name: Legendary Berserker
description: Legendary Berserker is a legendary Bandit class mod for Salvador (Gunzerker) in Borderlands 2. It can world drop from any appropriate loot source, with boosted drop odds from Vermivorous and Voracidous the Invincible.
notes:
During Gunzerking, the fire rate bonus only affects the right-hand weapon.

Do not confuse this with the Legendary Gunzerker class mod.

A SHiFT reward version exists via the Diamond Plate Loot Chest. The red flavour text references one of Brick's kill quotes.

The item card may show an incorrect fire rate value.

special.description:
Max-level bonuses: +57.5% cooldown rate, +50.6% fire rate (right hand only while Gunzerking), and +52.25% melee damage.

Unique effect: while Gunzerking, Salvador also gains +20% movement speed.
special.title: "Never look at my fist."

abilities: Increases Movement Speed by 20, while Gunzerking.
